2296580.name: Atomic Surf
2296580.description:
Aliens have taken your village, ravaged your planet and are now headed for Earth! Ride a rocket, ollie and glide through lush and diverse landscapes. Slash and blast your way through hordes of alien droids with an arsenal of futuristic weapons, upgrades and powerups. Challenge the stars, let nothing stand in the way as you battle to destroy the alien mothership.

Go solo or with a friend!
Featuring a full cooperative campaign mode, play online or locally on a split screen. Team up and show your style by blasting aliens together with tag-team combos and big-air tricks.

VR supported cross-platform play!
Travel at break-neck speed, soar through terrain, straighten every twist, and feel every bend. Designed for VR gaming from the ground up, play in full-immersive space-surfing VR mode or catch a quick game by playing in third person desktop mode.
2296580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
